remarkList.remark: Bunker Survey cost at Rotterdam included.
Final DA for Rotterdam less than estimated.
FDA for Huelva is less than estimated by $15k USD.
Port costs for all the ports finalized basis FDAs, Towage costs, and Latest PDAs.
Vessel departed Huelva with less bunkers than estimated by VMS.
Invoice #341227344-1 Replaced by 341227393 & 341227394. Charterers requested to split the cost basis each cargo parcel.
Drop in TCE due to vessel's late arrival at Suez due to numerous engine issues. Vessel missed to take the same day transit by 1 hour.
Repsol declared Coruna as the additional discharge port. LS freight added.

Vessel's schedule for Pasir Gudang, Singapore, and Port Klang updated. Although there were some delays, but the estimated demurrage is not included because discharge ports yet to be confirmed. and chances to have an expedited discharge.

Change in TCE due to: Vessel arrived Port Klang earlier than estimated but with less bunkers onboard because of full sea speed steaming in ballast passage. Cargo quantity for IOI, Bunge, CSSA, Rexon updated and freight invoices issued. CSSA loaded in Minus 5%, Rexon loaded in +1%, Bunge loaded in Minus 1%, IOI loaded minimum as per CP.
